title: Indulgent Moroccan Frankfurter Briouat
description: A rich and savory fusion of Moroccan flavors and a classic Frankfurter, wrapped in a crispy briouat and served in a copper mug.
instructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
Cook the Frankfurter according to the package instructions.
Unroll the phyllo dough and cut it into 8 equal squares.
Place a spoonful of the Frankfurter in the center of each square.
Sprinkle the Ayurvedic-friendly spices over the Frankfurter.
Fold the phyllo dough into a triangle and press the edges together.
Bake the briouats for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Mix the yogurt sauce (see below).
Serve the briouats in a copper mug with the yogurt sauce drizzled on top.
